home.title:
Professional Support 
for Animal Health
home.description: Established in 1973, Lian Hua Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. specializes in the research, development, and manufacturing of veterinary pharmaceuticals. With over half a century of expertise and technical innovation, Lian Hua remains steadfast in its commitment to Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) standards. Our rigorous operational protocols ensure consistent product quality, providing the livestock industry with safe and dependable medical solutions.

services.title: Service Intro
services.description: Driven by our core values of "Innovative R&D, Professional Service, Superior Quality, and Integrity," we strive for sustainable growth. Leveraging our proprietary SGP manufacturing technology, we offer a diverse range of high-efficacy products designed to safeguard animal health and elevate the standards of care across the livestock sector.

services.title: Essential Prescriptions & OTC Solutions
services.description:
With over a hundred essential prescriptions and over-the-counter (OTC) medications, our product line encompasses a diverse range of dosage forms:

• Injections & Suspensions
• Dry Powder Injections & Dry Powder Suspensions
• Soluble Powders & Oral Liquids
• External Disinfectants
• Medicated Feed Additives & Feed Supplements

services.title: Looking ahead
services.description: Looking ahead, Lian Hua and our management team will continue to advance product innovation and manufacturing excellence. By enhancing overall quality, we remain dedicated to creating lasting value for the livestock industry, consumers, and society as a whole.

Usage Restrictions: Do not use in laying hens, breeder hens, or swine weighing over 250 lbs.
Contraindications: Strictly prohibited for use in rabbits, guinea pigs, horses, and ruminants.
Treatment Monitoring: If symptoms of dysentery (watery, mucoid, or bloody diarrhea) do not improve after 2 days of treatment in swine, discontinue use.

當Side Effects: Swine may experience soft stools, diarrhea, or anal swelling during treatment. These symptoms typically resolve spontaneously within 5–8 days and do not require discontinuation of the medication.
Drug Interaction: Do not use concurrently with Erythromycin.
Drug Resistance: Incomplete cross-resistance may occur between this product and some macrolide antibiotics.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: phenazathionium
products.indications: Disinfection for Avian Influenza virus, Newcastle Disease virus, livestock and poultry skin, housing, feeding equipment, work tools, and udders.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
General Instruction: Stir and dissolve the product in warm water before use.
Avian Influenza Virus Disinfection: Use a 200-fold dilution for spraying or wiping.
Newcastle Disease Virus Disinfection: Use a 400-fold dilution for spraying or wiping.
Footbaths & Disinfection Trays: Use a 300–500 fold dilution; replace every 2–5 days or when the solution becomes soiled.
Housing, Feed Warehouses & Animal Bodies: Use a 500–700 fold dilution for spraying, sprinkling, or wiping.
Feeders, Waterers, Incubators & Brooders: Use a 500–700 fold dilution for spraying, sprinkling, or wiping.
Workwear, Footwear & Surgical Tools: Use a 500–700 fold dilution for washing, spraying, or wiping.
Breeding Egg Sanitization: Use a 500–700 fold dilution. Ensure the solution temperature is higher than the internal temperature of the eggs (typically 45°C). Immerse for approximately 2 minutes and avoid rapid air-drying.
Udder Washing & Disinfection: Use a 500–1,000 fold dilution for wiping.
Wounds, Mucosa & Pre-operative Skin Disinfection: Use a 1,000–1,500 fold dilution for wiping.

precautions.precaution: Preparation: Wash the target objects with water first. If soap is used, rinse thoroughly with water before applying this product.
Safety: Avoid contact with eyes or sensitive mucosa during application.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children.

products.name: WINTOZINE 500
products.indications: Disinfection of livestock and poultry housing, Avian Influenza, Newcastle Disease, and eel ponds.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Mucosal Disinfection: Apply using a 2,500 to 5,000-fold dilution.
Uterine Lavage: Flush using a 2,500-fold dilution.
Housing Disinfection: Spray using a 2,000 to 2,500-fold dilution.
Avian Influenza Disinfection: Spray using a 250-fold dilution.
Newcastle Disease Disinfection: Spray using a 500-fold dilution.
Eel Pond Disinfection: Use 120 ml of this product per 100 tons of pond water. Re-disinfect after 7 days.

precautions.precaution: Safety: Avoid splashing into eyes. In case of accidental contact, rinse with plenty of water and seek medical attention immediately.
Interaction: Do not mix with soap; rinse thoroughly before use.
Storage: Store in a cool place and keep out of reach of children.

products.name: BKB-S
products.indications: Cleaning, sterilization, and disinfection of livestock/poultry housing and equipment; full-body disinfection of breeding swine before mating; egg disinfection; disinfection for Avian Influenza and Newcastle Disease.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Infectious Disease Control: Spray using a 2,000-fold dilution.
General Disinfection: Disinfect by spraying, sprinkling, washing, or immersion using a 3,000-fold dilution.
Drinking Water System Disinfection: Use at a 10,000 to 20,000-fold dilution.
Avian Influenza Disinfection: Spray using a 500-fold dilution.
Newcastle Disease Disinfection: Spray using a 1,000-fold dilution.

precautions.precaution: Safety: Avoid splashing into eyes. In case of accidental contact, rinse with plenty of water and seek medical attention immediately.
Interaction: Do not mix with soap; rinse thoroughly before use.
Usage: Method (spraying, sprinkling, washing, or immersion) and dosage may be adjusted as needed.
Storage: Store in a cool place and keep out of reach of children.

products.name: POVIDINE 300

Disinfection of livestock/poultry housing and various equipment.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Pre/Post-operative Skin Disinfection & Skin Infections: Apply using a 300-fold dilution.

子Uterine & Vaginal Disinfection: Flush using a 400-fold dilution.
Housing & Equipment Disinfection: Spray using a 400 to 1,000-fold dilution.

precautions.precaution: Safety: Avoid splashing into eyes. In case of accidental contact, rinse with plenty of water and seek medical attention immediately.

products.name: UTOZINE 250
products.indications: Sterilization and disinfection of livestock and poultry housing.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
General Routine Disinfection: Dilute 150 to 300-fold.
　(a) Non-porous surfaces: Spray 100 mL per square meter.
　(b) Porous surfaces: Spray 300 mL per square meter.
During Disease Outbreaks or Epidemics: Dilute 50 to 100-fold.
Waterer Disinfection: Dilute 300-fold.

precautions.precaution: Storage: Store in a dark place at 15°C–30°C; avoid direct sunlight.
Safety: Do not swallow; avoid inhalation. Skin contact may cause allergic reactions.
Protection: Operators should wear appropriate protective clothing, gloves, and face/eye protection.

Emergency Measures:
(a) If swallowed: Drink large amounts of milk or water. Do not induce vomiting. Seek medical attention immediately.
(b) Skin/Eye contact: Rinse with plenty of water for 15 minutes. Seek medical attention immediately.
Environment: Use this product in a well-ventilated area.

products.dosageAndAdministration:
General Digestive Support: Mix 300–500 g of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Use consecutively for 5–7 days.
Stress, Disease, or Uric Acid Deposition: Mix 1,000–1,500 g of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Use consecutively for 3–5 days.
Pre-sale (To reduce weight loss or sudden death): Mix 600–1,500 g of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water. Start use 3 days before the sale.

products.name: GENTAMICIN 50
products.indications:
Swine: Treatment of Colibacillosis and swine dysentery.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Colibacillosis and Salmonellosis.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Swine (Colibacillosis): Mix 125 ml of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water (8,000-fold dilution). Administer consecutively for 3 days.
Swine (Dysentery): Mix 250 ml of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water (4,000-fold dilution). Administer consecutively for 3 days.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): For diarrhea, enteritis, and other complex infections caused by E. coli, mix 600 ml of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 3 days for swine and chickens.
Contraindications: Do not administer to animals with known hypersensitivity to this product.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: FLORCIN 100
products.indications:
Swine: Treatment of Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae (APP), Pasteurella pneumonia, Salmonellosis, Colibacillosis, and other diseases caused by sensitive bacteria.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of Colibacillosis.
Perciformes (Perch-like fish): Treatment of infections caused by sensitive Aeromonas hydrophila group, Pseudomonas fluorescens, Edwardsiella, Streptococcus, or Photobacterium.
Anguilliformes (Eel-like fish): Treatment of infections caused by sensitive Aeromonas hydrophila group, Pseudomonas fluorescens, Edwardsiella, or Pseudomonas anguilliseptica.
Salmoniformes (Salmon-like fish): Treatment of infections caused by sensitive Vibrio, Aeromonas salmonicida, or Aeromonas hydrophila group.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Swine: Administer 0.01–0.02 ml of this product per kg of body weight daily (equivalent to 1–2 mg potency), mixed into drinking water for oral administration.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Administer 0.2 ml of this product per kg of body weight daily (equivalent to 20 mg potency). Mix thoroughly into 1/4 to 1/2 of the daily drinking water volume. Administer consecutively for 5 days.
Aquatic Species (Perciformes, Anguilliformes, Salmoniformes): Administer 0.1 ml of this product per kg of body weight daily (equivalent to 10 mg potency) orally for 3–5 consecutive days.
Mule Ducks (Excluding laying ducks): Administer 0.4 ml of this product per kg of body weight daily (equivalent to 40 mg potency) once a day for 5 consecutive days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: Swine 3 days; Chicken 5 days; Perciformes 15 days; Anguilliformes 7 days; Salmoniformes 14 days; Mule Ducks 14 days.
Contraindications: Do not use in pregnant animals.
Treatment Duration: Do not exceed 7 consecutive days of treatment.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying poultry.

products.name: TILMICOSIN 250
products.indications:
Swine: Treatment of swine respiratory diseases caused by Mycoplasma hyopneumoniae, Pasteurella multocida, Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae, Actinomyces pyogenes, and other Tilmicosin-sensitive bacteria.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Treatment of respiratory diseases caused by Mycoplasma gallisepticum and Mycoplasma synoviae.
products.dosageAndAdministration:
Swine: Mix 80 ml of this product per 100 liters of drinking water (equivalent to 200 mg of Tilmicosin per liter). Administer consecutively for 5 days.
Chicken (Excluding laying hens): Mix 300 ml of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water (equivalent to 75 mg of Tilmicosin per liter). Administer consecutively for 3 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 14 days for swine; 12 days for chickens.
Contraindications: Do not use in breeding animals, horses, or other equid species.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in chickens over 16 weeks of age or in laying hens.

products.name: TOLTRAZURIL 25
products.indications: Chicken (Breeder): Treatment of coccidiosis infections.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Chicken (Breeder): Mix 1 L of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water for 2 consecutive days; OR mix 3 L of this product per 1,000 liters (1 ton) of drinking water, administered for 8 hours daily for 2 consecutive days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 8 days for chickens (breeders).

Usage Restrictions: The recommended withdrawal period of 8 days is longer than the 5-day life cycle of coccidia, which may lead to re-infection during the withdrawal period. Therefore, this product is not suitable for treating coccidiosis in laying hens during production or broilers near market age. Do not use in laying hens or broilers.
Safety: If accidental contact occurs, wash immediately. Keep away from food and out of reach of children.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
Usage Restrictions: Do not use in laying hens.

products.name: 復美淨500S
products.indications: Chicken (Broilers): Treatment of Colibacillosis, Salmonellosis, and Pasteurellosis.
products.dosageAndAdministration: Chicken (Broilers): Mix 2.4 ml of this product per 100 kg of body weight into drinking water (equivalent to 12 mg of active Flumequine per kg of body weight). Administer consecutively for 5 days.

precautions.precaution: Prescription Only: This product must be used under the prescription and supervision of a licensed veterinarian (or veterinary technician) by livestock owners, aquatic farmers, or feed mills.
Withdrawal Period: 2 days.
Preparation: Medicated water should be freshly prepared and used within 12 hours.
Usage Restrictions: Do not mix this product with solid feed.
Storage: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.

products.name: COLISTIN 200S
products.indications: Chicken, Turkey, Swine, Calf, & Lamb: Treatment of digestive tract infections caused by Colistin-sensitive bacteria (E. coli, Salmonella).
products.dosageAndAdministration:

Swine, Calf, & Lamb: Administer 50,000 IU per kg of body weight daily for 3–5 consecutive days.
